message:
feat(codegen): Migrate bigint_ops.zig to partial builder pattern

- Convert helper functions (emitBigIntFromInt, emitShiftOperand, etc.) to builder
- Rewrite genBigIntBinOp with builder pattern
- Update emitBigIntOperandValue to take ZigBuilder parameter
- Context structs retain emit() for callback compatibility

Reduced emit calls: 24 -> 12 (remaining are callback pattern required)
